The whole family will be spellbound as they look through the museum's collection of movies and interactive consoles. known globally as the International Space Station Mission Control and home of NASA mission control and astronaut training. This splendid 6acre dining and entertainment complex was made even more amazing by the amalgamated redevelopment of two of Houston's landmarks, the Central Waterworks building and fire station number one.
